data.title: 27.9 million UNI unlocked by Uniswap time-lock contract 8 days ago, another 2.5 million UNI transferred to Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @EmberCN, of the 27.9 million $UNI (about $192 million) released from the Uniswap time-lock contract 8 days ago (March 21), another 2.5 million (about $15.31 million) flowed into Binance in the past 8 hours. 3.74 million $UNI (about $23.53 million) have entered Binance in two days. Since the inflow began, the price of UNI has fallen by 10% (from $6.8 to $6.1). It is expected that a total of 5 million UNI will be transferred to centralized exchanges this time, and the relevant addresses currently hold 1.24 million UNI (about $7.73 million).

data.title: New Jersey regulator orders Robinhood and Kalshi to stop sports betting services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The New Jersey Gaming Enforcement Division issued an injunction on Thursday requiring Robinhood and Kalshi to stop providing sports-based prediction market services to state residents and cancel existing bets. Robinhood partnered with Kalshi earlier this month to launch a prediction market for the NCAA basketball tournament "March Madness". Regulators said the move violated New Jersey law and the constitution, which only allows licensed entities to offer sports betting. The two companies must comply by March 28 or face enforcement action. Robinhood said its services are regulated by the CFTC and has suspended new bets from New Jersey residents. (Decrypt)

data.title: Brazil Considers Bitcoin as Strategic Reserve for National Prosperity
data.description:
According to Foresight News, a senior advisor to Brazil's Vice President, Pedro Giocondo Guerra, emphasized the importance of Bitcoin as a strategic reserve for the country's prosperity during a recent speech. He stated that discussions on establishing a Bitcoin reserve could be crucial for Brazil's future success, aligning with both national and public interests.

Previously, Brazilian lawmaker Eros Biondini (PL-MG) proposed legislation to create a "Strategic Sovereign Bitcoin Reserve" (RESBit). The proposal suggests allocating 5% of Brazil's foreign exchange reserves to Bitcoin. The Central Bank of Brazil would oversee this reserve, utilizing advanced monitoring systems, blockchain technology, and artificial intelligence to manage transactions and custody.

data.title: Dogecoin Price Faces Whale Wall At $0.20—Reversal Possible?
data.description:
Dogecoin price continues to fall in tandem with the market, following Bitcoin’s recent drop by 3%. Just recently the market had recovered lifting Dogecoin above the $0. 19 mark after posting four straight intraday gains. Price has once again reversed in the favor of bears
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/28/dogecoin-price-faces-whale-wall-at-0-20-reversal-possible/

data.title: izebel.eth deposited $2 million in HyperLiquid and opened a 25x leveraged ETH long order
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, izebel.eth deposited $2 million USDC to HyperLiquid and performed the following operations: 
Opened ETH long orders with 25x leverage, holding 4,000 ETH, with a total value of approximately $7.62 million. 
Purchased 100,000 HYPEs for $1.34 million, with an average transaction price of $13.5.

data.title: CFTC Aligns Digital Asset Oversight with Other Assets
data.description:
According to PANews, the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is adjusting its review of risks associated with digital asset clearing and trading to align with its oversight of other assets. In a recent statement, the CFTC announced the withdrawal of two staff advisories to ensure there is no implication that digital asset derivatives will be treated differently from other products. This change may facilitate the listing of cryptocurrency futures by digital asset companies.

The move affects a trading advisory from 2018 and a clearing advisory from 2023. The agency noted that the trading advisory is no longer necessary as its staff has gained sufficient experience with virtual currency derivatives over the years.

The CFTC emphasized that the same principles apply to the listing of any derivative product, including the requirement that products should not be easily manipulated. The agency assured that this withdrawal will not impact its ability to oversee derivatives market clearing and prevent systemic risks.

data.title: Tesla's Musk-Led Government Efficiency Department Gains SEC Access
data.description: According to Odaily, the government efficiency department led by Tesla CEO Elon Musk has been granted access to the systems and data of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The SEC plans to establish a liaison team to collaborate with the department, although the specific intentions remain unclear. Previously, the department attempted to shut down USAID and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), leading to lawsuits alleging illegal actions. In January, U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order authorizing the department to reduce costs, but Musk's rapid approach has raised concerns among officials and lawmakers. SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce declined to comment, while new chairman candidate Paul Atkins expressed willingness to cooperate with the department.

data.title: xAI Acquires X in All-Stock Deal Valued at $80 Billion
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Elon Musk announced that xAI has acquired X through an all-stock transaction. The deal values xAI at $80 billion and X at $33 billion, accounting for $45 billion minus $12 billion in debt.

data.title: Dominari Holdings Buys $2 Million of BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wealth management company Dominari Holdings announced that it will use part of its cash reserves to purchase $2 million of BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) shares. The company is located in Trump Tower in New York, and its advisory board includes Trump's sons Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. Dominari does not hold Bitcoin directly, but obtains exposure through regulated ETFs to simplify compliance and accounting. This move reflects the Trump family's in-depth layout in the crypto field, and its son Donald Trump Jr. has recently actively participated in multiple crypto projects. (CoinDesk)
